results.title: Can Miles Bridges get over 'mixed feelings' from Suns fans?
results.description: The Miles Bridges era of Phoenix Suns basketball is not off to a great start. Once the trade was official, many fans across the Valley were not happy for a multitude of reasons.

results.title: Swim star Adam Ramsay-Peaty shows off new name after marrying into famous family
results.description: A family feud is in the past as the Commonwealth Games gold medallist declares ‘I’ll make sure the swimming does the talking’.
